title: Paw Patrol Fire Rescue: Rapid Reload Fire Truck with Marshall Figure, Quick-Fire Launcher, Lights and Sounds, Kids Toys for Boys and Girls Ages 3 and Up
features: Exciting Adventures Await: The Rapid Reload Fire Truck is 50,8 cm long and 22,8 cm tall, with thrilling lights and sound effects, and a movable rescue ladder for thrilling pretend play action

Mission Ready: Featuring a quick-fire projectile launcher that holds 5 projectiles, and a rapid reload feature holding 5 more. Rotate the launcher to unleash 10 projectiles consecutively and save the day
Imagination Ignited: Kids will love using the fire engine's movable ladder and rescue arm, then launching Marshall in a mini rescue vehicle that comes from inside the truck, just like in the show

PAWsome Gifts for Kids: When buying toys for ages 2-4, PAW nursery toys and toddler toys are toys for girls and boys who love toy cars and plushies, as alternatives to dolls, dinosaur toys or a train set
Includes: 1 fire engine, 1 Figure, 10 Projectiles, 1 Mini Vehicle, 1 Heat Scanner, 1 Crane Arm
Collect Them All: Expand your collection of PAW Patrol toys for kids with Rescue Wheels toy trucks, PAW Patrol film toys, dragon toys, stuffed animals, toy figures and playsets (each sold separately)
